agent_lanes.mission: Keep one sanctioned execution path, no stale desktop runner, and source-attested VM runner state.
near_term_work: Recheck VM process/source stamp before arming any exclusive window.
Keep legacy local scheduled tasks disabled.
Verify broker flatness before and after every trusted session.

agent_lanes.mission: Convert every paper session into broker-audited evidence that can be trusted for learning.
near_term_work: Require broker order audit, account activity audit, ending position snapshot, shutdown reconciliation, and completed trade economics table.
Reject raw PnL as a qualified winner unless evidence and teaching gates are clean.
Track broker/local economics drift as a first-class defect.

agent_lanes.mission: Build clean GCS-backed data tiers before expanding strategy breadth.
near_term_work: Maintain raw, curated, and derived tiers with manifests and quality scores.
Delay full-chain tick history until selected-contract and spread/fill evidence is stable.

agent_lanes.mission: Run large research-only sweeps that cannot affect the live manifest or risk policy.
near_term_work: Execute the 2070-variant bootstrap wave in reproducible chunks.
Produce normalized backtest results, after-cost expectancy, slippage stress, and drawdown/tail-loss reports.
Prioritize defined-risk expansion, single-leg repair, loser-cluster suppressors, and regime/liquidity filters.

agent_lanes.mission: Turn losing trades into suppressors, repairs, or kill decisions before adding risk.
near_term_work: Classify losers by symbol, regime, strategy family, entry timing, liquidity, stop type, spread quality, and broker/local drift.
Treat repeated single-leg directional losses as suppressors until new evidence clears.
Feed loser clusters into calibration and hold/kill/quarantine recommendations.

agent_lanes.mission: Prevent research sprawl from becoming execution risk.
near_term_work: Allow only research_only to governed_validation_candidate from research results.
Require train/test or walk-forward separation, positive after-cost test result, slippage survival, drawdown controls, clean metadata, and clean loser taxonomy.
Do not modify live manifest, strategy selection, or risk policy from research alone.

phases.objective: Keep the runner safe before any research or paper-session expansion.
phases.exit_gate: VM source stamp matches intended commit, broker flat, no stale local runner, no active unsanctioned scheduler.

phases.objective: Make the next paper session evidence-complete or explicitly disqualified.
phases.exit_gate: Session artifacts include broker/local economics and shutdown reconciliation.

phases.objective: Complete governed universe data quality and cost/freshness guardrails.
phases.exit_gate: All 11 governed symbols have quality verdicts and GCS manifests.

phases.objective: Run research-only sweeps at scale without changing the trader.
phases.exit_gate: Each chunk leaves normalized results, cost/slippage stress, and hold/kill/quarantine recommendation.

phases.objective: Promote at most one candidate to governed_validation_candidate if evidence clears.
phases.exit_gate: Candidate passes after-cost, robustness, concentration, loser-learning, and metadata gates.

phases.objective: Use evidence and loser-learning to improve tomorrow's controlled paper posture.
phases.exit_gate: Only suppressors/calibration insights are applied unless control-plane unlock policy explicitly allows more.

hard_rules: Do not start trading from this plan.
Do not arm an exclusive execution window from this plan.
Do not widen the temporary parallel runtime exception.
Do not modify the live manifest or risk policy from research results.
Do not count raw PnL winners as qualified winners without flat, reconciled, evidence-clean, teaching-clean closeout.
next_safe_actions: Run pre-arm VM source/process/broker-flat checks immediately before any sanctioned paper session.
Run research-only data-quality expansion for missing governed symbols.
Start the 2070-variant research wave in chunks only after each chunk has deterministic result artifacts and a cost cap.
Use loser-learning suppressors before considering any strategy addition.
